concept.title: "Household Chores"
concept.shortdesc: "This is a brief overview of some general household chores and how to do them."

conbody.p: "Everyone needs a clean place to live. Clean environments promote good mental health and help prevent the spread of diseases."
"But how does one do chores? For most, they are taught, but not everyone has the luxury of a teacher or hands on experience. As such, this guide will walk people through basic chores."
